label: AC-2(9)
title: Restrictions on Use of Shared and Group Accounts

prose.en: Only permit the use of shared and group accounts that meet {param:ac-02.09_odp}.

guidance.en: Before permitting the use of shared or group accounts, organizations consider the increased risk due to the lack of accountability with such accounts.

prose.en: the use of shared and group accounts is only permitted if {param:ac-02.09_odp} are met.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
system-generated list of shared/group accounts and associated roles
Organizational personnel with account management responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms implementing management of shared/group accounts

guidelines.en: conditions for establishing shared and group accounts are defined;

ac-02.09_odp.alt-label: conditions for establishing shared and group accounts
